The following events took place in '''312 BBY'''.

==Events==
*[[Berethron e Solo]] dissolved the [[Corellian empire]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> and established a republic on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].<ref name="SoF">''[[Suns of Fortune]]''</ref>
